_comment: Copy to test/local-fixture.json (gitignored) and fill in YOUR resume's Word ground truth: open the .docx in Microsoft Word and record what it actually shows. Every value below is an example.

summary.domPrefix: first words of your summary paragraph, lowercase

mods.new_content: Built **Python** and **SQL** automations processing 50K+ records daily, cutting latency 30%.
Tuned database workloads, resolving recurring slow queries and lifting performance 25%.

neighbor.expectPrefix: First words of the untouched neighbor bullet
